summary: Completed comprehensive testing of NASSAQ Phase 1 Foundation. Backend APIs fully functional, frontend UI working with minor school creation feedback issue. All core features including authentication, dashboard, AI assistant, and school management are operational.

integration_issues.issue: School creation form submits successfully but table doesn't immediately reflect new school count - may be a timing/refresh issue

passed_tests: Landing page loads with hero, features, pricing, testimonials sections
Login page renders with all form fields
Registration page renders with all required fields
Admin dashboard displays after successful login
Theme toggle (dark/light mode) works in header
Hakim AI Assistant button opens chat window
Hakim AI chat sends messages and receives responses
School creation dialog opens and form can be filled
All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes

success_percentage.frontend: 95% - All major UI flows working, minor table refresh issue
